text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking past the dorm...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Trainer! Let's have a good ol'-fashioned
barbecue!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yessiree! My folks sent over some juicy steaks!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Meat from the US is so succulent and tender. The
juice has some real flavor to it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Food like this is best served with a whole bunch
of folks diggin' in. That's that famous Japanese
hospitality!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So are ya down to party, Trainer? Better get on
board, 'cause we're blastin' off sky-high to meaty
heaven!
choice_data_list: Can't, sorry. But have a safe flight!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
A safe diet? You sayin' I need to take care of my
health?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hm, I reckon I should be watchin' what I eat. Too much meat and I might as well be the fat on a sirloin...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll try to rein it in. I can make do with
just two or three pounds of steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her efforts to cut back, Taiki Shuttle eats
a fair amount of meat, leaving her stomach full
and her vitality high.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, you better hold on tight! 'Cause we're
racing to see who can gobble down the most
steak!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And don't worry your head none about eatin' too
much! They sent it in bulk!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I reckon everybody's down to dine and dash
today! Or is it dine till ya drop? Either way, let's
eat till our bellies burst!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up devouring a mountain of meat
together. My stomach manages to remain intact,
but I expect my weight to rocket upwards.
